claimText: Green firecrackers do not contain barium, a substance conventionally used in firecrackers to produce a green color.
evidenceExcerpt: Does not contain barium substance, used in firecrackers to add green colour.
examUse: Statement-based question on the chemical composition of green firecrackers.
distractorHooks: Green firecrackers use barium for green color
Barium is a mandatory component of green firecrackers

claimText: Green firecrackers use Potassium Nitrate as an oxidant and contain low amounts of thermite and minimal aluminium.
evidenceExcerpt: Composition: Low Thermite amount, minimum usage of Aluminium. Does not contain barium substance, used in firecrackers to add green colour. Uses Potassium Nitrate as oxidant.
examUse: Statement-based question on the chemical composition of green firecrackers.
distractorHooks: Contains high amounts of aluminium for brightness

claimText: Green firecrackers reduce particulate matter emissions by at least 30% compared to conventional firecrackers.
evidenceExcerpt: Benefit: Reduce at least 30 % emissions using particulate matter.
examUse: Statement-based question on the environmental benefits of green firecrackers.

claimText: Green firecrackers are identified and certified by the CSIR NEERI logo.
evidenceExcerpt: Identification and Certification: CSIR NEERI Logo.
examUse: Institution-feature question regarding the certification authority for green firecrackers.
distractorHooks: Certified by the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change directly
Certified by the Central Pollution Control Board (CPCB)

claimText: SWAS (Safe Water & Air Releaser) green firecrackers emit fine water droplets that absorb dust.
evidenceExcerpt: SWAS (Safe Water & Air Releaser): Emit very fine water droplets that absorb dust.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching green firecracker types (SWAS, SAFAL, STAR) with their specific features.
distractorHooks: SWAS emits minimal smoke without water droplets
SWAS is free from potassium nitrate

claimText: STAR (Safe Thermite Cracker) green firecrackers are free from potassium nitrate and sulfur, and emit minimal smoke.
evidenceExcerpt: STAR (Safe Thermite Cracker): Free from potassium nitrate and sulfur; emit minimal smoke.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching green firecracker types with their chemical exclusions.
distractorHooks: STAR contains safe amounts of aluminium and is quieter
STAR uses potassium nitrate as an oxidant

claimText: SAFAL (Safe Minimal Aluminium) green firecrackers contain a safe amount of aluminium and are quieter than conventional crackers.
evidenceExcerpt: SAFAL (Safe Minimal Aluminium): Contain safe amount of aluminium & are quieter.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching green firecracker types with their specific features.
distractorHooks: SAFAL is completely free of aluminium
